name: protein-lab
description: Multi-tool dry-lab workflows and experiment guardrails for Protein Lab.

interface.longDescription: Protein Lab helps Codex turn Feishu research tasks into local rounds, run multi-tool computational biology workflows, interpret raw tool outputs, refine candidates, write Chinese reports, and capture project-specific guardrails from postmortems. AlphaFold Server is supported as an initial tool family, not the boundary of the platform.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me run a Protein Lab dry-lab research task from experiment design through tool execution, interpretation, and reporting.
